evidence: Big 50's B/B- Horror/Sci-Fi movie fan here, and this entry was one of the better ones
I recommend this for horror fans, especially if you adore 'mad scientist' and man-made monster stories ala 'Frankenstein.'
Dickens' marvelous characters and complex story
Atypical sci-fi 'monster' movie that focuses most attention on the humans...and 'humanity' across species
the story and pacing are somewhat on the tedious side
the story is strange but interesting
Admirable attention to building something significant on the foundation of the original story
Quality, quality, quality in EVERY role!
The visuals in HD are stunning
the images and sound were spectacular
the movie makes depiction of the disturbing events very authentic and engrossing
captivating characters in every direction and intertwined stories that leave you virtually breathless

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and horror genres, appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They enjoy visually stunning content that evokes deep emotional responses, while their loyalty to specific creators is not strongly indicated.
